proven_comparative_edges.meaning: Replacement to the first eight-shot battle branch.
Second eight-shot battle branch to one timed music design.
Second eight-shot battle branch to another timed music design.

prompts.status: Battle shot and music-design text exists, but no generation prompt is proven to belong to the working candidate.

ordered_references.status: The battle text branches expose no directly joined ordered media-reference stream.

image.reason: The group needs stable guardian, tiger, weapon, threat, frontier, damage, and collision-state references.

video.reason: Charge, camera motion, impact or pre-impact cut, fall, and blackout are intrinsically temporal.

audio.reason: Dialogue warning, drums, machine impact, blackout, and two source-backed timed music designs require an audio contract.

revision_conflicts: shown impact versus cut before collision
different camera and music timing constraints

unresolved: threat disabled versus collision not shown

evidence_limits: Both eight-shot battle branches are partial alternatives and cannot replace complete-script coverage.
Music-design text proves an intended audio structure, not a rendered audio artifact or approved mix.
No image or video generation node is directly joined to the battle text branches in the saved graph.
